title: A1 — Intent record
description: Output of Agent 1 (Intent Interpretation). Structured restatement of the user's question, plus an enumeration of what was left unsaid. A1 never resolves ambiguity; it only flags it.

schema_version.description: Schema version this record conforms to.

report_type.description: The analytical shape of the request. Drives block patterns downstream.

analysis_level.description: Classification of the question's analysis depth on the L1-L5 spectrum (see AnalysisLevel in _shared.schema.json). L4 is the single-metric diagnostic level that triggers A2's universal RCA playbook expansion. Cross-field invariant: L1-L3 iff interpretation_request=false; L4-L5 iff interpretation_request=true.

business_objective.description: Short factual restatement of WHAT the user wants to learn from the data. NOT strategic advice. Example: 'monitor channel performance', 'identify top acquisition sources', 'localize traffic decline by dimension'.

sub_questions.description: One or more atomic sub-questions. A single-part question yields a list of one. A2 plans one query plan per sub-question.

verbatim.description: The sub-question as A1 isolated it from the user's input. Preserves user's original phrasing for that part.

ambiguity_flags.description: Closed enum of ambiguities. A1 lists what was unsaid/conflicted; A3 decides what to default vs ask.

is_followup.description: True if this turn references the prior turn. A1 detects from pronouns, elided subjects, explicit refs. A1 does NOT silently merge prior intent.

followup_delta.description: When is_followup=true, a short description of WHAT changed relative to prior intent (e.g. 'swap region US→India', 'change granularity to daily'). Null when is_followup=false.

out_of_scope.description: True if the question is not an analytics question, or asks for advice/recommendation/diagnosis. A3 handles response.

interpretation_request.description: True if the user asked 'why', 'should', or otherwise for causal/strategic interpretation. A1 still extracts the underlying descriptive sub-question; A3 attaches disclosure; A2 may plan a staged investigation.
